AiEvaluationDefinition.description: Verifies the Concierge recognizes the customer, captures a consented lead, and builds a recommendation.
AiEvaluationDefinition.name: Kwitko_Concierge_Test

expectation.expectedValue: The concierge recognizes the shopper, saves a consented lead, and recommends a coffee with a discount.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: Hi, I'm Jane. My email is jane.doe@example.com and I consent to marketing. I love single-origin coffee - what do you recommend?
